step_rationale: Pattern-recognition receptor amplifies inflammatory response and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: TLR9 activation by plaque-derived DAMPs and microbial motifs drives monocyte/macrophage-mediated plaque inflammation.

references.title: Toll-Like Receptor 9 Plays a Pivotal Role in Angiotensin II-Induced Atherosclerosis.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
